title: SpecFarm Plugin Manifest
description: Manifest format for SpecFarm ecosystem plugins. Defines identity, capabilities, sandbox permissions, and entry points.

id.description: Unique plugin identifier (lowercase, hyphens allowed, no leading/trailing hyphen)

description.description: Optional short description of the plugin

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the plugin's main script or executable (must be inside plugin directory)

permissions.description: Sandbox permission declarations. All permissions are deny-by-default.

read.description: Glob patterns for allowed read paths (relative to repo root)

write.description: Glob patterns for allowed write paths (relative to repo root). Must be inside .specfarm/plugins/<id>/ or tmp.

network.description: Whether the plugin may make outbound network requests. Must be false for most plugins.

exec.description: Allowed executable names the plugin may invoke (e.g. ["git", "jq"]). Wildcards not permitted.

hooks.description: Optional lifecycle hooks the plugin subscribes to
